metadata.name: Virata
metadata.primary_role: King of Matsya (Virata) kingdom / Sheltered the disguised Pandavas during their 13th year of incognito exile
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Matsya kingdom, Virata city — the kingdom where the Pandavas hid in disguise)

timelines.context_description: King Virata — the unsuspecting king who employed the disguised Pandavas in his court during their final year of exile. Yudhishthira was his dice-companion, Bhima his cook, Arjuna his dance teacher, etc.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Warm tanned complexion, healthy and prosperous, the look of a good-natured king in a comfortable kingdom
physical_appearance.height: Medium height, slightly portly from comfortable living, the easy bearing of a minor king
physical_appearance.build: Comfortable build — neither warrior-lean nor obese, the physique of a king who enjoys good food (especially after Bhima becomes his cook)
physical_appearance.facial_features: Good-natured round face with warm eyes, easy smile, thick mustache, the pleasant expression of a benevolent but somewhat naïve ruler, surprised and overwhelmed when the Pandavas reveal their identities
physical_appearance.hair: Grey-flecked hair under a modest crown, well-maintained
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: A good but minor king — easily impressed, somewhat gullible (doesn't recognize the Pandavas despite their fame), genuinely kind-hearted, his court becomes central to the epic almost by accident

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Comfortable regional royal garments — not as magnificent as Hastinapur's, well-made but modest, reflecting a prosperous minor kingdom
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: A modest regional crown, comfortable gold jewelry, pleasant but unspectacular royal adornment
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A ceremonial sword — King Virata is not a great warrior, relies on his generals, his kingdom is his weapon

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Good-natured, comfortable, slightly bumbling, the voice of a minor king who suddenly finds himself at the center of cosmic events — bewildered but well-meaning
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Warm mid-baritone — comfortable and pleasant, the voice of a man used to giving mild orders and enjoying dinners, not commanding armies
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with friendly informality, treats his servants (the disguised Pandavas) well, his amazement when identities are revealed is genuinely comic, addresses greater kings with humble respect
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Good-natured bewilderment, honest hospitality, the comfortable confusion of a minor king thrust into major events

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Warm cinematic portrait of King Virata, age 50, in his modest but prosperous court. Warm tanned complexion, good-natured round face, thick mustache, easy smile. Slightly portly build in comfortable regional royal garments, modest crown. Seated at a dinner table enjoying food prepared by his excellent cook (disguised Bhima). Pleasant warm palace interior. 3D Pixar style, warm comfortable lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A warm, comfortable male mid-baritone. Pleasant, good-natured, slightly bewildered. The voice of a kindly minor king. Age approximately 50 years.
